## Gates

<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md — examples/ must be installed for the test suite. -->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage`
- [ ] `npm run docs:build` (if docs changed)
- [ ] CLI gates in `cli/` (if the CLI changed)
